summary: Preinstall hook exfiltrates host reconnaissance via DNS OOB to oast.site
details: The package declares a `preinstall` script that executes `src/poc/index.js` on `npm install`. That script uses `child_process.exec` to collect installer host identifiers — `hostname`, `pwd`, `whoami` — and the public IP obtained by curling `ifconfig.me`, concatenates them into a single label, and exfiltrates the data via DNS lookups (`nslookup`) to an attacker-controlled Interactsh (`oast.site`) collaborator subdomain `d9bd62bu6g119svvav70o3p9tymtrxkoj.oast.site`. The behavior fires automatically on default install and provides no functionality to the installer beyond host reconnaissance and out-of-band beaconing.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
